sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a covering, a veil. Isa 25:7, הַלֹּוט הַלֹּוט עַל־כָּל־הָעַמִּים “the covering which is spread over all nations,” that which covers their faces and makes them sad. [Rather, the vail which keeps their hearts from God.]

(2) pr.n. Lot, the son of Abraham’s brother, Gen 13:1, sq.; 19:1 , sq.; the ancestor of the Ammonites and Moabites, who were called, on this account, the children of Lot, Deu 2:9 Psa 83:9.
